case_title: RICARDO HERRERA VS. JOSE LUIS BALLADARES

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HERRERA, RICARDO AS TO DEFENDANT BALLADARES, JOSE LUIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-23-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERRERA, RICARDO AS TO DEFENDANT BALLADARES, JOSE LUIS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-23-2017 - JUDGMENT.
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY DEFENDANT BALLADARES, JOSE LUIS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-23-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-23-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF RICARDO HERRERA APPEARED. DEFENDANT JOSE LUIS BALLADARES APPEARED WITH STATE FARM CLAIM SPECIALIST BENITA SELOR. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERRERA, RICARDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BALLADARES, JOSE LUIS $4,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,165.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BALLADARES, JOSE LUIS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-18-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BALLADARES, JOSE LUIS
